---
title: "BVD2 Efficacy"
author: "Olivia Rippee"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(epitools)
library(flextable)
```

```{r data}

file_path <- "your_excel_sheet.xlsx"

all_sheets_list <- file_path %>%
  excel_sheets() %>%
  set_names() %>%
  map(~ read_excel(path = file_path, sheet = .x))

invisible(list2env(all_sheets_list, envir = .GlobalEnv))  # Map sheets to R dataframes

# Clean dataframes
# -----------------
Mortality <- Mortality %>%
  mutate(Group = recode(Group, `1` = "Control", `2` = "Vaccine")) %>%
  mutate(Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Control", "Vaccine")))

Leukopenia <- Leukopenia %>%
  rename_with(~ gsub(" ", "_", .)) %>%
  mutate(Group = recode(Group, `1` = "Control", `2` = "Vaccine")) %>%
  mutate(Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Control", "Vaccine")))

# CS Note: yes = any clinical event greater than or equal to 2 with or without fever 
# (fever does not need to occur with clinical signs)

ClinicalSigns <- na.omit(`CS with or without Fever`) %>%
  rename_with(~ gsub(" ", "_", .)) %>%
  mutate(Group = recode(Group, `1` = "Control", `2` = "Vaccine")) %>%
  mutate(Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Control", "Vaccine")))

```


```{r fxn}

# P-value formatting function
format_p <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p)) return(NA_character_)
  if (p < 0.0001) {
    output <- "< 0.0001"
  } else {output <- sprintf("%.4f", p)}}

# 5-number summary formatting function
format_integer <- function(x) {
  ifelse(x %% 1 == 0,
    formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 0),
    formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 2))}

```

# Mortality

```{r mortality}

summary_counts <- Mortality %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarize(
    Positive = sum(toupper(Mortality) == "YES"),
    Total = n(),
    Prop = Positive / Total,
    .groups = "drop")

# Create 2x2 contingency table
ct <- table(Mortality$Group, Mortality$Mortality)

# Relative risk with bootstrap CI
RR_result <- riskratio(ct, method = "boot")

RR_estimate <- RR_result$measure[, "estimate"]
RR_lower    <- RR_result$measure[, "lower"]
RR_upper    <- RR_result$measure[, "upper"]
fisher_p    <- RR_result$p.value[, "fisher.exact"]

# Extract vaccine prevented fraction (assuming Vaccine is 2nd row)
PF_vac       <- 1 - RR_estimate[2]
Lower_CI_vac <- ifelse(PF_vac == 1, "Not estimable", 1 - RR_upper[2])

# Create final summary table
summary_table <- summary_counts %>%
  arrange(Group) %>%
  mutate(
    `Treatment Group` = ifelse(Group == "Control", "1 = Control", "2 = Vaccine"),
    `Proportion of Mortality` =
      paste0(Positive, " / ", Total, " = ", sprintf("%.2f", Prop)),
    `Prevented Fraction` =
      ifelse(Group == "Control", sprintf("%.2f", PF_vac), ""),
    `Lower 95% Confidence Bound` =
      ifelse(Group == "Control",
          ifelse(!is.na(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Lower_CI_vac))),
                  sprintf("%.2f", as.numeric(Lower_CI_vac)), Lower_CI_vac), ""),
    `Fisher Exact p-value` = ifelse(Group == "Control", format_p(fisher_p[2]), "")) %>%
  select(
    `Treatment Group`,
    `Proportion of Mortality`,
    `Prevented Fraction`,
    `Lower 95% Confidence Bound`,
    `Fisher Exact p-value`)

# Create flextable
flextable(summary_table) %>%
  set_caption("Incidence of Mortality") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = 7) %>% 
  fontsize(size = 11, part = "all")

```

<br>

# Leukopenia

```{r leukopenia}

summary_counts <- Leukopenia %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarize(
    Positive = sum(toupper(Leukopenia) == "YES"),
    Total = n(),
    Prop = Positive / Total,
    .groups = "drop")

# Create 2x2 contingency table
ct <- table(Leukopenia$Group, Leukopenia$Leukopenia)

# Relative risk with bootstrap CI
RR_result <- riskratio(ct, method = "boot")

RR_estimate <- RR_result$measure[, "estimate"]
RR_lower    <- RR_result$measure[, "lower"]
RR_upper    <- RR_result$measure[, "upper"]
fisher_p    <- RR_result$p.value[, "fisher.exact"]

# Extract vaccine prevented fraction (assuming Vaccine is 2nd row)
PF_vac       <- 1 - RR_estimate[2]
Lower_CI_vac <- ifelse(PF_vac == 1, "Not estimable", 1 - RR_upper[2])

# Create final summary table
summary_table <- summary_counts %>%
  arrange(Group) %>%
  mutate(
    `Treatment Group` = ifelse(Group == "Control", "1 = Control", "2 = Vaccine"),
    `Proportion of Positive Cases` =
      paste0(Positive, " / ", Total, " = ", sprintf("%.2f", Prop)),
    `Prevented Fraction` =
      ifelse(Group == "Control", sprintf("%.2f", PF_vac), ""),
    `Lower 95% Confidence Bound` =
      ifelse(Group == "Control",
          ifelse(!is.na(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Lower_CI_vac))),
                  sprintf("%.2f", as.numeric(Lower_CI_vac)), Lower_CI_vac), ""),
    `Fisher Exact p-value` = ifelse(Group == "Control", format_p(fisher_p[2]), "")) %>%
  select(
    `Treatment Group`,
    `Proportion of Positive Cases`,
    `Prevented Fraction`,
    `Lower 95% Confidence Bound`,
    `Fisher Exact p-value`)

# Create flextable
flextable(summary_table) %>%
  set_caption("Incidence of Leukopenia") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = 7) %>% 
  fontsize(size = 11, part = "all")

```

<br>

# Clinial Signs with or without Fever

```{r clinical signs}

summary_counts <- ClinicalSigns %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarize(
    Positive = sum(toupper(Clinical_Signs_of_BVD2) == "YES"),
    Total = n(),
    Prop = Positive / Total,
    .groups = "drop")

# Create 2x2 contingency table
ct <- table(ClinicalSigns$Group, ClinicalSigns$Clinical_Signs_of_BVD2)

# Relative risk with bootstrap CI
RR_result <- riskratio(ct, method = "boot")

RR_estimate <- RR_result$measure[, "estimate"]
RR_lower    <- RR_result$measure[, "lower"]
RR_upper    <- RR_result$measure[, "upper"]
fisher_p    <- RR_result$p.value[, "fisher.exact"]

# Extract vaccine prevented fraction (assuming Vaccine is 2nd row)
PF_vac       <- 1 - RR_estimate[2]
Lower_CI_vac <- ifelse(PF_vac == 1, "Not estimable", 1 - RR_upper[2])

# Create final summary table
summary_table <- summary_counts %>%
  arrange(Group) %>%
  mutate(
    `Treatment Group` = ifelse(Group == "Control", "1 = Control", "2 = Vaccine"),
    `Proportion of Positive Cases` =
      paste0(Positive, " / ", Total, " = ", sprintf("%.2f", Prop)),
    `Prevented Fraction` =
      ifelse(Group == "Control", sprintf("%.2f", PF_vac), ""),
    `Lower 95% Confidence Bound` =
      ifelse(Group == "Control",
          ifelse(!is.na(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Lower_CI_vac))),
                  sprintf("%.2f", as.numeric(Lower_CI_vac)), Lower_CI_vac), ""),
    `Fisher Exact p-value` = ifelse(Group == "Control", format_p(fisher_p[2]), "")) %>%
  select(
    `Treatment Group`,
    `Proportion of Positive Cases`,
    `Prevented Fraction`,
    `Lower 95% Confidence Bound`,
    `Fisher Exact p-value`)

# Create flextable
flextable(summary_table) %>%
  set_caption("Incidence of Clinical Signs (with or without fever)") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = 7) %>% 
  fontsize(size = 11, part = "all")

```
